title: Frequency of element query
hints: Use a hashmap to count the frequency of each element in array A.
Iterate through array A and increment the count for each element in the hashmap.
For each query in array B, look up its frequency in the hashmap.
If an element from B is not found in the hashmap, its frequency is 0.
Return an array containing the frequencies for all queries in the same order as array B.
